outline.title: SKYNZ
outline.summary: Creator-Owned Platform Powered by Solana. Own Your Creator Page. Control Your Audience. Build Your Legacy.
outline.image_plan: /home/ubuntu/upload/FACEBOOKBANNERSKYNZ.jpeg - The image is a title banner for SKYNZ, matching the title slide content and branding.

outline.title: The Problem
outline.summary: Creators don't own their audiences. Platforms control reach, monetization, and can ban creators instantly. 87% of creators feel platform-dependent with no portable audience ownership.

outline.title: The Opportunity
outline.summary: $104B creator economy growing 25% annually. 200M+ creators seeking ownership and control. Perfect timing with mainstream blockchain adoption.

outline.title: The Solution
outline.summary: SKYNZ offers creator-owned pages with blockchain verification via Solana NFTs. 92% revenue share, customizable pages, collectible badges, and full content control.
outline.image_plan: /home/ubuntu/upload/SKYNZotherplafomsamplepage.png - This image shows a sample SKYNZ creator page with various features, directly illustrating the solution.

outline.title: Business Model
outline.summary: Multiple revenue streams: Creator subscriptions ($9.99-$999.95), collectible badges, NFT minting, marketplace commission (8% vs 30% competitors), and premium features.

outline.title: Go-to-Market Strategy
outline.summary: 4-phase organic growth: Foundation (100 creators), Logo Incentive (1K creators), Community (5K creators), Enterprise (10K creators). No paid ads, creator-driven growth.

outline.title: Competitive Advantage
outline.summary: 100% creator ownership, blockchain verification, 92% revenue share, full customization, collectible badges, and portable audience. Defensible moat through NFT ownership and network effects.
outline.image_plan: /home/ubuntu/upload/SKYNZsampleofotherplat.png - This image shows a comparison of a creator's page on a traditional platform versus SKYNZ, visually highlighting the competitive advantage.

outline.title: Financial Projections - Year 1
outline.summary: Q1-Q4 growth: Creators 100→10K, MRR $5K→$500K, Total revenue $1.146M, Profitability by Q4. Path to profitability: Month 12.

outline.title: Financial Projections - Years 2-3
outline.summary: Year 2: $8M revenue, $3M profit, 50K creators. Year 3: $20M revenue, $10M profit, 100K creators. Consistent 50-150% growth trajectory.

outline.title: The Team
outline.summary: Experienced builders with creator economy expertise, blockchain knowledge, product design excellence, and organic growth specialization. Passionate about creator ownership.

outline.title: Use of Funds
outline.summary: $1M seed round: Product Development 40%, Marketing & Growth 30%, Operations 15%, Contingency 15%. 18-month runway to Series A.

outline.title: Funding Timeline
outline.summary: Seed: $1M now for 18 months. Series A: $5M at Month 18 with 10K creators and $1M+ ARR. Path to profitability and international expansion.

outline.title: Why Invest in SKYNZ
outline.summary: Massive market, creator demand at peak, perfect timing with blockchain maturity, defensible business model, early-mover advantage, and 50%+ net margins by Year 3.

outline.title: Call to Action
outline.summary: Join the creator revolution. We're building the future of creator ownership. Looking for strategic investors, Web3 partners, and creator economy advisors.

outline.title: Key Metrics
outline.summary: Creator growth: 100→10K in 12 months. Revenue: $6.5K→$780K quarterly. Break-even Month 9, profitable Month 12, 50%+ margins by Year 3.

outline.title: Competitive Analysis
outline.summary: SKYNZ vs Patreon (ownership advantage), Substack (multi-media), YouTube (control & revenue), TikTok (monetization). Each competitor has weaknesses SKYNZ solves.

outline.title: Risk Mitigation
outline.summary: Regulatory: Legal counsel & compliance. Adoption: Community focus. Competition: Fast execution & moat. Technical: Experienced team & redundancy.

outline.title: Success Metrics
outline.summary: Year 1: 10K creators, $1M ARR, profitability. Year 2: 50K creators, $8M revenue, international expansion. Year 3: 100K creators, $20M revenue, DAO governance.
